Bugs sharing a root cause are grouped here so you fix one thing instead of N. Click any ticket ID to jump to its full bug card below.
🧪 Test Quality Audit 2 weak test(s)
Tests below contain no real assertion or only tautological/vacuous checks. They always pass — they don't actually verify anything about the app, contributing only noise to the report.
SeverityTestIssueLocation
HIGHTestQA07Accessibility::test_qa07_phone_input_has_label`assert or True` always passes — the X check is deadtest_qa_comprehensive.py:1916
HIGHTestQA08MobileAndViewport::test_qa08_hamburger_menu_visible_on_mobile`assert or True` always passes — the X check is deadtest_qa_comprehensive.py:1980
To fix: open the test file and replace the weak assertion with one that actually checks the expected outcome (e.g. assert exact text, URL, or DOM state — not X >= 0 or True).

Every distinct value the suite fed into the app — phone numbers, OTPs, XSS payloads, search strings, viewport sizes, etc. Click any spec to expand and see the inputs per test type.

QA-01 -001 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa01 find teacher navigates to find tutors
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa01_find_teacher_navigates_to_find_tutors 🕐 2026-05-08 17:54:27 ⏱ 2.66s
📋 What this test was checking
Clicking Find a Teacher with no filters navigates to /en/find-tutors — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Click the navigation link being tested
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Clicking Find a Teacher with no filters navigates to /en/find-tutors.
✗ What actually happened
Find a Teacher did not navigate to find-tutors: https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
No screenshot captured (test may have failed before page loaded)
E   AssertionError: Find a Teacher did not navigate to find-tutors: https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
E   assert ('find-tutors' in 'https://dev.mehadedu.com/en' or 'find_tutors' in 'https://dev.mehadedu.com/en')
E    +  where 'https://dev.mehadedu.com/en' = <Page url='https://dev.mehadedu.com/en'>.url
E    +  and   'https://dev.mehadedu.com/en' = <Page url='https://dev.mehadedu.com/en'>.url

tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:228: in test_qa01_find_teacher_navigates_to_find_tutors
    assert "find-tutors" in page.url or "find_tutors" in page.url, (
E   AssertionError: Find a Teacher did not navigate to find-tutors: https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
E   assert ('find-tutors' in 'https://dev.mehadedu.com/en' or 'find_tutors' in 'https://dev.mehadedu.com/en')
E    +  where 'https://dev.mehadedu.com/en' = <Page url='https://dev.mehadedu.com/en'>.url
E    +  and   'https://dev.mehadedu.com/en' = <Page url='https://dev.mehadedu.com/en'>.url
Browser: Chromium Viewport: 1280x720 Env: Staging Spec: View page
QA-01 -002 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa01 send code enabled after phone entry
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa01_send_code_enabled_after_phone_entry 🕐 2026-05-08 17:54:27 ⏱ 4.38s
📋 What this test was checking
Send Code button must become enabled after a valid phone is entered — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
fill("98976564")
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Enter a phone number in the WhatsApp number field
  3. Click the 'Send Code' button
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Send Code button must become enabled after a valid phone is entered.
✗ What actually happened
Send Code button still disabled after valid phone entered
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
No screenshot captured (test may have failed before page loaded)
tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:428: in test_qa01_send_code_enabled_after_phone_entry
    assert not is_disabled, "Send Code button still disabled after valid phone entered"
E   AssertionError: Send Code button still disabled after valid phone entered
E   assert not True

tests/test_qa_comprehensive.py:428: in test_qa01_send_code_enabled_after_phone_entry

🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa13_no_server_version_disclosure 🕐 2026-05-08 17:54:27 ⏱ 1.06s
📋 What this test was checking
Server / X-Powered-By headers should not disclose framework versions (e.g. 'nginx/1.18.0', 'Express') — info-disclosure issue — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Server / X-Powered-By headers should not disclose framework versions
✗ What actually happened
Server version disclosed in response headers: ['X-Powered-By: Next.js'] — helps attackers fingerprint vulnerable versions. Recommend: server_tokens off; (nginx) or x-powered-by removal

Proof of Concept — Screen Recording

✅ PASSED test_qa02_ec_phone_boundary_lengths 7, min, 7, digits 3.37s
What this test checks:Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing. Default country is +966 Saudi Arabia which expects ~9 digits. Other lengths may legitimately disable Send Code as a validation signal — that is correct behavior, not a bug. We verify the form remains responsive and the input was accepted; we do NOT assert Send Code becomes enabled at every length.
Test data used:7, min, 7, digits
Duration:3.37s
Test function:test_qa02_ec_phone_boundary_lengths
✅ PASSED test_qa02_ec_homepage_no_crash_on_rapid_clicks BASE_URL 5.62s

Test function:test_qa02_ec_homepage_no_crash_on_rapid_clicks

Duration:5.62s

✅ PASSED test_qa03_no_404_on_homepage_resources BASE_URL 3.45s
What this test checks:Homepage must not request any resource that returns 404.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:3.45s
Test function:test_qa03_no_404_on_homepage_resources
✅ PASSED test_qa03_cors_headers_not_wildcard_for_auth BASE_URL 1.60s
What this test checks:Auth-related pages must not use overly permissive CORS (*) in responses.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:1.60s
Test function:test_qa03_cors_headers_not_wildcard_for_auth
✅ PASSED test_qa03_protected_api_rejects_no_auth BASE_URL 2.06s
What this test checks:Probe likely-protected endpoints with NO auth header — must not return user data (200 + JSON with PII fields). 401/403/404 are all OK; a redirect is OK; only an unauthenticated 200-with-data is a bug.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:2.06s
Test function:test_qa03_protected_api_rejects_no_auth
✅ PASSED test_qa03_forged_jwt_rejected BASE_URL 1.73s
What this test checks:Send a syntactically valid but unsigned JWT — server must reject with 401/403. Accepting forged tokens (200) is a critical auth bug.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:1.73s
Test function:test_qa03_forged_jwt_rejected
✅ PASSED test_qa03_idor_other_user_id_not_accessible BASE_URL 3.15s
What this test checks:IDOR probe — request /api/users/{id} for a few IDs without auth. Must not leak per-user records to anonymous callers.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:3.15s
Test function:test_qa03_idor_other_user_id_not_accessible
✅ PASSED test_qa03_session_cookie_marked_httponly_secure BASE_URL 2.17s
What this test checks:If a session cookie is set on login flow, it must be HttpOnly + Secure. Cookies that lack these flags are XSS-stealable.

✅ PASSED test_qa05_hallucination_no_impossible_success_on_wrong_otp fill("000000") · TEST_COUNTRY_CODE · TEST_PHONE · TEST_USER_NAME 8.95s
What this test checks:Wrong OTP must NOT produce a login success message (hallucinated success). Note: 'Welcome back' is the modal *title* — it is shown before any login attempt, so we exclude it from the hallucinated-success phrase list. The test only flags phrases that imply a *completed* login.
Test data used:fill("000000") · TEST_COUNTRY_CODE · TEST_PHONE · TEST_USER_NAME
Duration:8.95s
Test function:test_qa05_hallucination_no_impossible_success_on_wrong_otp
✅ PASSED test_qa05_error_garbage_not_shown_on_modal_failure fill("000000") · TEST_COUNTRY_CODE · TEST_PHONE 21.84s
What this test checks:After any modal error, raw JSON / stack traces must not be visible. Resilient to OTP rate-limit (HTTP 429): we always check the visible page for garbage content, even if Send-Code/Continue could not be clicked.
Test data used:fill("000000") · TEST_COUNTRY_CODE · TEST_PHONE
Duration:21.84s
Test function:test_qa05_error_garbage_not_shown_on_modal_failure
✅ PASSED test_qa05_consistent_page_after_language_round_trip BASE_URL 3.83s
What this test checks:EN → AR → EN round-trip must return to clean homepage without phantom state.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:3.83s
Test function:test_qa05_consistent_page_after_language_round_trip

What this test checks:Every application/json response on homepage load must parse and be a dict or list (not a stray string or null). Catches malformed JSON, accidental HTML error pages served with json content-type, and truncated responses.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa06_json_responses_are_well_formed
Expected:Every application/json response on homepage load must parse and
What happened:ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'jsonschema'

❌ qa13_security_headers — 0 passed · 6 failed · 6 total ▶ Show tests
Click any test row below to expand and see what was verified, the test data used, and (for failures) what went wrong in plain English.
❌ FAILED test_qa13_strict_transport_security_present BASE_URL —
What this test checks:HSTS header must be present on HTTPS responses (forces TLS).
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa13_strict_transport_security_present
Expected:HSTS header must be present on HTTPS responses (forces TLS).
What happened:Missing Strict-Transport-Security header — HTTPS downgrade attacks possible. Recommend: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload
Bug ticket:QA-13 -001 — see full details below
❌ FAILED test_qa13_x_frame_options_or_csp_frame_ancestors BASE_URL —
What this test checks:Must protect against clickjacking via X-Frame-Options OR CSP frame-ancestors.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa13_x_frame_options_or_csp_frame_ancestors
Expected:Must protect against clickjacking via X-Frame-Options OR
What happened:Page is clickjacking-vulnerable — missing both X-Frame-Options and CSP frame-ancestors. xfo='', csp=''
Bug ticket:QA-13 -002 — see full details below
❌ FAILED test_qa13_x_content_type_options_nosniff BASE_URL —
What this test checks:X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff prevents MIME-sniffing attacks.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa13_x_content_type_options_nosniff
Expected:X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff prevents MIME-sniffing attacks.
What happened:X-Content-Type-Options should be 'nosniff' to prevent MIME-sniffing attacks. Got: ''
Bug ticket:QA-13 -003 — see full details below
❌ FAILED test_qa13_referrer_policy_present BASE_URL —
What this test checks:Referrer-Policy controls what referrer info is leaked to other sites.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa13_referrer_policy_present
Expected:Referrer-Policy controls what referrer info is leaked to other sites.
What happened:Missing Referrer-Policy header — full URL referrers may leak to third-party sites. Recommend: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
Bug ticket:QA-13 -004 — see full details below
❌ FAILED test_qa13_content_security_policy_present BASE_URL —
What this test checks:A Content-Security-Policy header should be set (XSS mitigation).
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa13_content_security_policy_present
Expected:A Content-Security-Policy header should be set (XSS mitigation).
What happened:Failed: No Content-Security-Policy (nor CSP-Report-Only) header — XSS payloads have no defense-in-depth mitigation
Bug ticket:QA-13 -005 — see full details below
❌ FAILED test_qa13_no_server_version_disclosure BASE_URL —
What this test checks:Server / X-Powered-By headers should not disclose framework versions (e.g. 'nginx/1.18.0', 'Express') — info-disclosure issue.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:—
Test function:test_qa13_no_server_version_disclosure
Expected:Server / X-Powered-By headers should not disclose framework versions
What happened:Server version disclosed in response headers: ['X-Powered-By: Next.js'] — helps attackers fingerprint vulnerable versions. Recommend: server_tokens off; (nginx) or x-powered-by removal
Bug ticket:QA-13 -006 — see full details below

✅ qa17_memory — 2 passed · 0 failed · 2 total ▶ Show tests
Click any test row below to expand and see what was verified, the test data used, and (for failures) what went wrong in plain English.
✅ PASSED test_qa17_modal_open_close_no_heap_growth BASE_URL 10.90s
What this test checks:Opening the login modal 10 times must not grow JS heap > budget.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:10.90s
Test function:test_qa17_modal_open_close_no_heap_growth
✅ PASSED test_qa17_detached_dom_nodes_count BASE_URL 7.78s
What this test checks:Count detached DOM nodes — large leaks would surface here. We use a heap-snapshot proxy: count the difference between document.querySelectorAll('*').length and a stress scenario. Soft fails (warn only) if >5000 elements remain after cleanup.
Test data used:BASE_URL
Duration:7.78s
Test function:test_qa17_detached_dom_nodes_count
